entity.summary: Historical Tezos decentralized exchange preserved in current DEX registry data as a distinct exchange venue.
entity.notes: DefiLlama preserves Dexter Exchange as a Tezos DEX. A current first-party interface, exact launch date, terminal date, and reliable boundary to later Dexter2 implementations were not established in this review. HEI therefore records the candidate conservatively as inactive and does not assert a shutdown cause or succession relationship.

evidence.title: Dexter Exchange protocol registry entry
evidence.notes: Protocol registry preserves Dexter Exchange as a Tezos decentralized exchange identity.

evidence.title: DefiLlama DEX registry corpus
evidence.notes: The DEX registry corpus preserves a Dexter Exchange row for Tezos. No current first-party application was independently verified, so the row is not used to assert active status.
